do_if.value: global.$GT_ReturnHomeHold? and global.$GT_ReturnHomeHold.{$object}? and global.$GT_ReturnHomeHoldUntil? and global.$GT_ReturnHomeHoldUntil.{$object}? and player.age ge global.$GT_ReturnHomeHoldUntil.{$object}

global.$GT_IdleParkingHold? and global.$GT_IdleParkingHold.{$object}? and global.$GT_IdleParkingHoldUntil? and global.$GT_IdleParkingHoldUntil.{$object}? and player.age ge global.$GT_IdleParkingHoldUntil.{$object}

@$undock and ((global.$GT_ReturnHomeHold? and global.$GT_ReturnHomeHold.{$object}? and (not global.$GT_ReturnHomeHoldUntil? or not global.$GT_ReturnHomeHoldUntil.{$object}? or player.age lt global.$GT_ReturnHomeHoldUntil.{$object})) or (global.$GT_IdleParkingHold? and global.$GT_IdleParkingHold.{$object}? and (not global.$GT_IdleParkingHoldUntil? or not global.$GT_IdleParkingHoldUntil.{$object}? or player.age lt global.$GT_IdleParkingHoldUntil.{$object})) or $gtHoldUndockForWrapper)

debug_text.text: '[GT ORDER PATCH] Preventing undock for GT dock wrapper order on ship: ' + $object.knownname + ' order=' + @$object.order.id
